findings.title: TireWearDataPoint table empty — regression/calibration pipeline has no production history
findings.evidence: SELECT count(*) FROM tire_wear_data_points returned 0; 1320 RECALCULATION events in 60d produced 0 data points
findings.dataQuerySummary: All 6 ACTIVE setups have installed_odometer_km IS NULL; recalculate guard requires currentOdo>installedOdo
findings.impact: Regression blend and fleet accuracy metrics non-functional; ground-truth leakage risk latent only
findings.recommendation: Populate installed_odometer_km on install/activate; verify createMany path; backfill not in audit scope

findings.title: recalculate() writes predicted tread as actualTreadMm when no measurement exists
findings.evidence: tire-health.service.ts lines 428-429: actualFrontAvg falls back to frontAvgPredicted
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code review confirmed; prod table empty so no stored synthetic residuals yet
findings.impact: When data points begin writing, regression/k-factor calibration may self-reinforce model bias with zero residuals
findings.recommendation: Skip data-point insert without measurement; add source enum column; exclude synthetic rows from regression

findings.title: Trip kilometers largely not applied to tire setup counters
findings.evidence: Fleet sum totalKmOnSet=282 vs completed trip km 2881.6 in 60d; per-vehicle gaps 148-1287 km
findings.dataQuerySummary: updateTireUsageFromTrip only called from POST enrichTrip; no trip ledger or idempotency key
findings.impact: usageFactor and behavior-linked wear under-informed; remaining km overstated
findings.recommendation: Chain trip finalize to tire usage or document mandatory enrich; add trip_id processed ledger

findings.title: Identical TireHealthSnapshot rows within same minute
findings.evidence: 2 duplicate groups / 2 extra snapshot rows in 60d window
findings.impact: Inflated snapshot time-series; retention storage growth
findings.recommendation: Dedupe key on snapshot insert or upsert per hour bucket

findings.title: Duplicate RECALCULATION TireEvent bursts
findings.evidence: 3 event groups with >1 RECALCULATION in same minute
findings.dataQuerySummary: GROUP BY vehicle,set,minute HAVING count>1 on tire_events
findings.impact: Audit trail noise; correlates with duplicate snapshots
findings.recommendation: Align manual recalc with scheduler dedupe; transactional idempotency token

findings.title: ClickHouse unavailable during audit probe
findings.evidence: docker container synqdrive-clickhouse not running at probe time
findings.dataQuerySummary: HF trip mirror could not be queried; PostgreSQL vehicle_trips used as canonical trip source
findings.recommendation: Re-run CH queries when container healthy; Phase 4 scope

findings.title: No vehicle qualifies as VALIDATION_READY
findings.evidence: 0 manual measurements in 60d for 4/6 vehicles; installed_odometer null all; 0 ground-truth wear points
findings.impact: Production model validation must remain code-level until data quality improves
findings.recommendation: Target VEHICLE_004 for first validation pilot after odometer + trip usage fixes

findings.title: RentalHealthService.getSummary without HM context — DIMO-only pressure on rental gate
findings.evidence: rental-health.service.ts:108 calls tires.getSummary(vehicleId) without hmTirePressure; intelligence API injects HM at controller
findings.impact: Booking gate and rental-health UI may miss HM TPMS ISSUE; source mislabeled hm_oem when DIMO values present
findings.recommendation: Inject getTirePressureSignals in rental-health path; split source enum DIMO/HM/MIXED

findings.title: DIMO kPa stored as bar in vehicle_latest_states — wear model misinterprets pressure
findings.evidence: VEHICLE_002 VPS values 274-301 in tire_pressure_*; catalog unit bar; computePressureFactor nominal 2.5 bar
findings.impact: Pressure wear factor neutral or wrong on sole DIMO TPMS vehicle; false over-inflation if interpreted as bar
findings.recommendation: Normalize kPa to bar at DIMO ingest

findings.title: Rental blocking uses regex on warningHints and alert.type for pressure severity
findings.impact: Fragile i18n; PRESSURE_IMPACT alert type does not match tpms regex — may not escalate
findings.recommendation: Use TireAlertCode enum and structured pressureContext severity

findings.title: evidence_type=measured when tread measurement exists but displayMode may be ESTIMATED
findings.evidence: evaluateTires sets measured if latestMeasurementAt!=null regardless of displayMode
findings.impact: Rental health overstates measurement evidence; conflicts with target policy for estimated critical
findings.recommendation: Split wearEvidence and pressureEvidence in read model

findings.title: No tire-specific Prometheus metrics; tire recalculation queue not monitored
findings.evidence: grep tire_ in observability module returns 0; dimo.tire.recalculation absent from MONITORED_QUEUES
findings.impact: No SLO for recalc failures, pressure coverage, or prediction error
findings.recommendation: Add tire_recalculation_total, tire_pressure_coverage_ratio, queue lag for dimo.tire.recalculation

findings.title: TireHealthService and evaluateTires untested; 22/30 audit scenarios MISSING
findings.evidence: tire-health-test-coverage-2026-07.csv; 136 backend + 29 frontend tire tests pass but orchestration gaps
findings.impact: Consumer wiring and blocking regressions undetected in CI
findings.recommendation: Add tire-health.service.spec.ts and rental-health evaluateTires cases

findings.title: Notifications follow rental module state not TireHealthSummary.alerts — PRESSURE_IMPACT may not notify
findings.evidence: projectVehicleHealthWarnings emits TIRE_CRITICAL only when modules.tires warning/critical
findings.impact: Alert duplication risk low but coverage gap for warning-level tire alerts
findings.recommendation: Map canonical TireAlertCode to notification types explicitly
